# AIFreePlan

AIFreePlan is an AI tools free credits aggregator. We help users find free credits, trials, and promotions for AI tools including video generation, image generation, LLMs, and coding assistants.

## Tools

- Kling AI (video): 66 credits/day — https://aifreeplan.com/en/video/kling
- MiniMax Hailuo (video): 66-100 credits/day — https://aifreeplan.com/en/video/hailuo
- Luma Dream Machine (video): 30 generations/month — https://aifreeplan.com/en/video/luma
- Runway (video): 125 credits (one-time) — https://aifreeplan.com/en/video/runway
- Pika (video): ~10 generations/day — https://aifreeplan.com/en/video/pika
